name: Playboys 13
description: The Playboys 13 (PBS13) is a large Sureño street gang with approximately 6,500 members, founded in the mid-1950s as the 'Southern California Latin Playboys Car Club' at Pico Boulevard and Fedora Street in West Los Angeles. Mexican Mafia-affiliated. Has spread to Orange County, Washington, Oregon, Texas, Utah, Pennsylvania, and Mexico. Multiple factions: Westside (original, Pico/Fedora), Eastside (49th Street, South Central), and Southside (Bell Gardens/South Gate). Each clique operates autonomously with no central leadership. Known for their Playboy bunny tattoo/graffiti. Rivals with 18th Street, Florencia 13, and most other Sureño gangs despite shared La Eme affiliation.
